payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At the beginning of its turn, it's now grappled up in front of you. It pulls its blade with both of its hands and its head turns back towards you, now that you're the one who's been pushing it out, and it begins to unleash two heavy strikes against you. That's another 25 and that's going to be an 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you manage to push it out of it, right there, and you're both outside of the darkness.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Look what I caught!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You caught a big one!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah I did!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh wait, he's outside the darkness?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: But we can't see him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, but he's across from me, through the darkness.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's through the darkness.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Help me subdue him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I will when it's my turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Beau, that's your movement. You still have an action if you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to do another crack to the forehead with my off-handed attack. That's a natural one. No! Wait. No, it is. I thought it was a seven. Thought it might be a seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll say as you swing, he manages to loosen the grip a little bit and the rope comes a little bit loose. If it attempts to break your grapple, it's going to have advantage on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, it is now the creature's turn. The creature is going to swing one strike at Beau in front.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The 19 does hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What about the one?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, 1d8 plus four is--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 12, thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12? Nice. So as you crack across the head, you watch the helmet slip a little bit. You can see a little bit of the jaw beneath the mask now and the skin itself has a dark blue, purple color. You see white teeth that have pretty prominent incisors visible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I take a free action to be like  We just want to talk to you, damn it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're just shouting, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Did you hear that important detail about the enemy that he just revealed?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Uh, nope. We were talking. What was the detail? I mean (coo) what was the detail?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Pretty sizable incisors, sharp fucking teeth.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (cooing)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whoa. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, Beau, is that the end of your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, Travis. It's important stuff that we're talking about.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Let's see here. It's now going to swing forward and head over to make a strike at you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Disadvantage on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, you prevented a natural 20, that's good. So that's 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Still hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Still hits. That is--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was good that she didn't get critted.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ten points of slashing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are you still up?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh! Wait, we just healed her.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I did, but not for that much.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Beau falls to the ground unconscious. The rope goes loose. At which point, the creature turns around towards you, Fjord. As you focus on its face you feel this swing from behind as the shadow version is going to try--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nonlethal!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Not in the face!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's going to be 21.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (high-pitched) Watch out for the teeth (coo).

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is nine points of slashing damage and it vanishes. The impact, the actual blow hits and discards itself into the impact of the blow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't think he wants to talk to us.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It discards itself.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So that gets you 116 platinum pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But also bows are really cool. We should give him some, because he's got all these barbs and they'd be really fun to decorate.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, you want to put my bo in bows--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's no bows.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just tie him up quick!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This language spell runs out in an hour, let's speed this up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You strip him of everything he has. There's the armor you pull off, there's the blade and the sheath. There's a pair of dark, jagged black boots that are pretty cool, three daggers that are all hidden in pockets in the armor, and a pouch that is hidden within the plating of the leather armor that is filled with quite a few coin if you go and inspect within.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is anybody writing all of this stuff down?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes, yes I am.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Boots, something.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sword, sheath, black boots, yup.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Three daggers and lots of gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I am the inventory person. Shit.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: And 12 gold pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, you want to put my bo in bows--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's no bows.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just tie him up quick!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This language spell runs out in an hour, let's speed this up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You strip him of everything he has. There's the armor you pull off, there's the blade and the sheath. There's a pair of dark, jagged black boots that are pretty cool, three daggers that are all hidden in pockets in the armor, and a pouch that is hidden within the plating of the leather armor that is filled with quite a few coin if you go and inspect within.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is anybody writing all of this stuff down?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes, yes I am.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Boots, something.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sword, sheath, black boots, yup.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Three daggers and lots of gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I am the inventory person. Shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So that gets you 116 platinum pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Whoa, platinum?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to put 116 platinum.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You weren't even writing it down.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 13. Still fails. All righty. So as the eyes glass over for a minute, the snarling and the tension in the muscles relax for a minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Devil's Tongue.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is a...

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Wisdom save, second level.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That would be a nine. That does not succeed. Okay. You watch the eyes gloss over for a second. Wait, hold on a second. Where's my Player's Handbook? Do you have it real fast?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Here I'll grab this one real fast.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, I was sitting on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Double-check one more thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Are you trying to weasel out of my--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I am trying to confirm. One of the racial traits of the elves, if I recall, is they have--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, a resistance to charm?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Or advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Half-elves did. I remember team half-elves did.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. Advantage on saving throws on being charmed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So you get one more roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Roll low, roll low!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's going to be a 12.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's a wisdom save, so it's ten plus my wisdom modifier?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's eight plus-- yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So, that's 13.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "No. That was my companion." You see at this point, now, as friendly as it has been, there's this look of, "I might be saying too much and I don't trust the most of you still."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I've got one job on this ship. It's stupid, but I'm going to do it! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You're making a very, very good argument, and my friends are your friends. We're all here to help.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The Beacons are sacred. I have lived four lifetimes. As long as the Beacons remain, me and my people will live more."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you make babies still?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We do."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. And they live as long as the Beacon lives too?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The souls continue. With each rebirth, the memories retain."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What is your intention for the people in this empire, this kingdom?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What is the intention of the empire?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, your people's intention, for all those who live here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We live. We worship. We learn. We die. We are reborn until we are perfect."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh jeez.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We find more Beacons."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There's more of them?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is this thing what we saw take out half the Zauber Spire?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: (chuckles) I will say, since it wasn't a single person, I'm going to ask for a deception roll from both of you, since you were the first two to speak up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh God!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Shh! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are you drunk, Nott?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Not yet, but now I will be!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys manage to head back up into the Tri-Spires, back into the alleyway. As you close and lock the thing behind, a voice in the back of the alley-- you guys watch as two crownsguard approach and go, "Hey! You!" And both pull their swords to hold out in front, and one guy in the back, a third one arrives with a crossbow up to you guys and says, "Hands up, weapons."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: One, two, three? Don't know who you're point-- oh, everybody?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This would be all of you guys as you got out of the sewer.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We came back up. Oh, shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What's your business?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We were scared, things were falling from the sky.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We took cover in the sewers.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We were working at the festival. We're just trying to get out, man.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Has the danger passed?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You start hearing whispers about the gala, and like, "How many people were killed?" "Oh, I heard like 100 people were murdered." "Serves them right, those fucking rich bastards." You know, passing conversations. It's now, the buzz of the town, even this late at night, as people are now either emerging to see the scene, or are returning to their homes, seeing what they have. But the crowd has dissipated, or at least the crowd has moved on towards the King's Hall, and are probably in the process of trying to figure out what the fuck happened to the object they were carrying. You guys manage to dart off to the side of the is the eastern end of the Interstead Sprawl. You aren't apparently followed at the moment, but you're still holding this glowing--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It's not worth it. Come on." The girl, (sniffs) "Fine." They both turn and walk away, kicking the dirt a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And just for Taliesin, I say  Stay in school! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perfect.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I've know you too long now. I feel sick.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What a perfect stay in school moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stealth and try to track back towards Caleb. But make sure no one else is also following him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. All right, so you guys dart off into another alleyway. You still do hear guards shifting, but you start hearing other people are talking. People are starting to go back to their homes. They're whispering to each other. Listening in, you hear phrases being said, like, "The city's on lockdown. This is crazy. I'm supposed to be leaving tomorrow!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) This is a lockdown? Shit.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "He was here for a while, and then left with some friends. Think Dolan and his boy were in for a bit. They rushed out in a hurry about an hour ago?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nobody here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You think the whole damn thing was a fucking distraction?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sure feels like it, doesn't it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I really don't like being used. Who's at the bar? Is there anyone at the bar?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, there is the general barkeep there, which would be-- Clay Owens.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Clay Owens?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, he's a balding, portly gentleman, middle age or so. As you walk in, he, "Aye, can I get you something?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hey Clay, how's it going? Long night?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right. Crazy night, from what I'm hearing."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I know, right? Can I go ahead and get a double to help with the night?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Aye, certainly. Here you go."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Had anyone come in tonight? Any one of the usuals? Seen Ulog? Seen Kara?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No? No. Oh no, Ulog was in earlier this evening."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Horris nods. "Okay. Then we stay." And Dolan says, "No, I stay. Just in case things go wrong, I want you safe and gone. If this is to be turned around, I'm the one they're going to look to. I’m the one who actually has the political influence here. I'm the one who can talk and make a difference, if that is to be done in the next few days, or the next week. If you can just, for a while, trust me and just leave. Is that okay?" He looks to you, and Horris kind of-- "Fine, but I'll come back soon."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I understand. Fortunately, in this situation, you don't have much to lie about. You were here. You weren't at the Richter’s. You weren't involved in it in any way. The Knights of Requital are going to take the fall for this, that would be the only tie-in. Ulog is dead. You have a chance to do some real good here.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I don't know. Just out of the city. Just out of the city for a week. That's all I ask."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Dolan, I know Horris and you both are worried. We're still going to need that payment. Our efforts have incurred some damages.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Of course. I don't have Kara's, but I have ours and I have Ulog's. He left that with us before he left tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did he let me in?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes. He let you in at this point. Horris brought you in. He points over, too, and you can see there's a smaller sack and a larger one that's more of a backpack that seems to the be one that Ulog left. He goes, "Take them, please. That's of no use to us." At this point, Horris is letting Beauregard in, and knowing that it's just the two of you, he puts his hand on your shoulder and says, "Keep him safe. Get him out if you can, please."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Anywhere you prefer? Is there a hiding spot?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: A seven? Hard to tell. I mean, just looking at the level of decomposition, it's been here a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Once-a-day walkie-talkie.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You head down into the basement area beneath the Leaky Tap. Once again, the guard is pretty sparse. You’ll see one guard walk past, but their numbers seem to have been ushered elsewhere in the city. So you make it down there and you take enough time that you eventually get the lock back open that you left. You head down into basement. It's exactly how you left it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is the place. Are you with us?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I am.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is the place I was talking to you about. The skeleton’s right over there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I say we put it behind the skeleton.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I go take a look at this skeleton. I would like to try to ascertain how long this fucker has been here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a medicine check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Not great at all, like all my skill rolls. Seven.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "No, not on me. Well-- Come back in the morning, I might have something for you."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Jester had all the shit, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I had all the shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. So you head back up into the Leaky Tap Tavern. There’s a handful of patrons, a lot of them are talking or whispering about the events tonight. Talking about, "The tower’s still up there! It’s crazy!" The general conversation-hubbub through the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I go to the barkeep. Is Claudia awake?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Probably in her office."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay! I go and knock on the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. "Who is it?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It’s me, Jester!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Um, w-what do you want?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Claudia! When we were over at the Gala, we saw things that were going on, it was crazy, a tower exploded and then all hell broke loose. Did you know someone tried to steal my stuff?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I did not know that. My apologies."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you have maybe a safe or something? Because I don’t feel safe carrying around my jewelry anymore with me.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Okay, then come back in the morning. I will have it cleared out."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I did not know that. My apologies."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you have maybe a safe or something? Because I don’t feel safe carrying around my jewelry anymore with me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, not on me. Well-- Come back in the morning, I might have something for you."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Claudia, are you naked? Why won't you open this door?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Flush.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, I am busy at the moment."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is everything okay?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Everything is just fine."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Claudia. Blink once-- knock-- say you're not okay if you're not okay because you sound weird.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm fine. Do not worry."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. But you do have a safe I can put my jewelry in now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It is currently in use, but I can swap it out. How long do you need it for?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I was going to put it in my room for as long as we're here, if that's okay with you.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Make an intelligence check. Because you are an alchemist, I'll give you advantage on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are we in a room? We should be in a room instead of in the--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not downstairs?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Upstairs, yeah. Convene in-room.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's money and loot. Let's take a look.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Convene in the girls' room. It's bound to be cleaner.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Mm-hmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We did have a pillow fight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's down feathers all over the place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's pretty (blows out lips).

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So we've got some stuff. What did we get?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (heavy thud) Nott, what is this made out of?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This? I will taste it. I will lick the safe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's very... iron-y? It's like licking a nine volt battery.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is it made of lead?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's ironic. It's not what we want.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I really was trying to get a lead box.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You did very well considering it's after midnight and you got a metal box for free.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's true.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know, can I tell it's lead-- I mean, iron, not lead?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You back away from it, and it dissipates over the next 30 or so seconds. You keep watch to see if anybody else notices, and it doesn't. It rises up, and thankfully by the time it would hit the roof as a smoke beacon, it mostly has dissipated enough in the sky where it doesn't cause a column of visible darkness. The edge that you're catching of it, the little bit that's wafting through, has this very fine metallic smell to it, almost. The brief bit that catches your nostrils, you feel your sinuses open up very abruptly, and like a mouth full of wasabi, it's like (coughing). Eventually it clears out, and you walk inside.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are you fucking serious?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did any of us hear it from the second floor?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Everyone else make a perception check, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Natural one!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You hear a slight shift in the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It was that Agoura Hills earthquake.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Exactly.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you just fart?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You would think so, but no. I think they're doing something.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I heard something.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are they trying to fucking escape?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm just eating bar popcorn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It sounded like a thump.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: A fucking thump?!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That doesn't sound like an escape.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Everything's messy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I hope they're not dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's something we can find out in the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does our room look down onto the alleyway?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your room does not, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So, at this point, back up a little bit, and I open the door and back up to see what I see.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Smoke?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A purplish dark fume wafts out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I back away from it.

payload.raw_text: We did it. Totally. So, as the dark takes your dreams, sleep brings calm, brings peace, brings rest. There's a soft hum that seems to radiate around you. A welcoming softness. A light, not quite white, not quite dark, it's a grayish, familiar light, strangely. You feel it pull you forward, through stars. The distant night sky. You see beacons of light coast by. You see a dark sphere before you. Then there's a flash of light, and you're standing there and you're holding the object in your hand which you keep. It's welcoming. You look into it for a moment, and look ahead, and you see yourself. And you see another self. And you see another self. And a fourth Caleb, and a fifth Caleb, and an endless row of Calebs, all slightly different. All begin walking in different directions at once. You look down at the object and back up again and they're all gone. You see a distant flame flicker. You feel yourself hypnotized by its movement. You look down again at it, and there's something wonderful and ancient about this thing. You can't grasp it. Its scale is both too large and too small. The more your mind tries to make sense of it, the more you feel yourself walking in 17 different directions at once. All those Calebs you saw before are all within you and they're all pulling at different sides and it confuses you. It scares you for a moment, but once again you focus back on this object and the warmth is comforting. You look up again at the stars; they've stopped passing by. They're held in place. And for the first time in a long time, you feel at peace. That's the end of your dream. All right, let's bring everybody else back in, please. You wake up in the cold, dark basement of this relatively unused cellar beneath the Leaky Tap. Come to consciousness with the most restful night's sleep you've had in a long time, it feels, almost. You look over at Nott curled up right against your thigh, like a dog, asleep. Come on in. (laughter)

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Don't roll hit dice! Roll hit points when you come here!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: How do you play Dungeons & Dragons?!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: You won't need dice! You're fine.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: We did it. We reclaimed our dignity. We did it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: We did it. Totally. So, as the dark takes your dreams, sleep brings calm, brings peace, brings rest. There's a soft hum that seems to radiate around you. A welcoming softness. You look down again at it, and there's something wonderful and ancient about this thing. You can't grasp it. Its scale is both too large and too small. The more your mind tries to make sense of it, the more you feel yourself walking in 17 different directions at once. All those Calebs you saw before are all within you and they're all pulling at different sides and it confuses you. It scares you for a moment, but once again you focus back on this object and the warmth is comforting. You look up again at the stars; they've stopped passing by. They're held in place. And for the first time in a long time, you feel at peace. That's the end of your dream. All right, let's bring everybody else back in, please. You wake up in the cold, dark basement of this relatively unused cellar beneath the Leaky Tap. Come to consciousness with the most restful night's sleep you've had in a long time, it feels, almost. You look over at Nott curled up right against your thigh, like a dog, asleep. Come on in. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are we doing the level four thing now?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So we're doing it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are we doing the level four thing, or we doing it after?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just wait.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just set up your stuff except for your hit points; we'll roll those when you get back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Pick up and walk.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay okay okay!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Where do we go?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This way!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're going this way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Bye, Caleb!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I have to say it because Taliesin said it (whispers) Don't die.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Bring your dice so we can roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I love you guys! I don't mean the Mighty Nein, you're assholes, but I love you guys!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll kill you in your sleep! Okay, bye!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You don't roll a d20 for hit points, Sam!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Grab all the dice. Grab all the dice!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm grabbing my bag!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Don't roll hit dice! Roll hit points when you come here!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How do you play Dungeons & Dragons?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You won't need dice! You're fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We did it. We reclaimed our dignity. We did it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: If you die in the level-up, you die in real life. All right, so anyway, continuing. The hit points are the main thing, and your abilities, we can keep tabs on that if it comes into play, and we can define stuff after the episode tonight. But anyway. As you all come to consciousness in the morning, the day is before you. What do you wish to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I roll a d8?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For you, yes. I believe it's a d8.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whoa, nice!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Eight!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nice! All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: When I leveled up, it already gave me two extra hit points. Why?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Because that's your modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's your modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so now I add the extra eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You add the eight to it. Yeah, it automatically adds your level up to that. Roll yours.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Aw, three.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: d10, no con modifier?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you get con modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Every class gets a con modifier to hit points.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right. Six!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, I just got ten extra hit points!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like that was really bad. That was a really bad roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's okay. Sometimes you get better rolls than others.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, she's dead now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) If you don't roll at least four hit points, you die in your sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, that's the rule.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "It's going to be a lot of lead, and a few days to make it."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Do you make anything out of lead?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I mean, I certainly can. Depends what you're hoping to have made."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Could you perhaps make me a really pretty-- so, my mother is a big fan of things made out of lead. She said she likes the color of that metal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's a very curious liking, but sure, I'll take it."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She gets a lot of things in gold and stuff and so she says that lead looks very different from that and she thinks it's pretty.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Hey, I'm not judging."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So I want to make her a really pretty jewelry box out of lead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The halfling scratches his temple and goes, "Well, I mean, if you're willing to pay, I can make it."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay! It's like she has a lot of jewelry, so something like around this big.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Okay, we’ll go ahead and get started on that there. Full cost to you, two days' work, materials. That'll run you back about one and a half gold. One gold, five silver."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The halfling scratches his temple and goes, "Well, I mean, if you're willing to pay, I can make it."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay! It's like she has a lot of jewelry, so something like around this big.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It's going to be a lot of lead, and a few days to make it."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can it just be lead-lined? Is that a thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It can be thin as a sheet of parchment.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so not a whole lead box, maybe like a box made out of wood and then pretty lead on the inside.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That there's a little more easy to put together."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Or maybe on the outside so she doesn't realize it's not made of lead?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't need to be as-- Am I here? I've been doing this with my spells.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's up to you. Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It needs to be sealed all the way around and be able to close.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's a good friend of my mom's.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Right."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Everybody knows her mom.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "All right. Come back here in about 48 hours. Should be good."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It can be thin as a sheet of parchment.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so not a whole lead box, maybe like a box made out of wood and then pretty lead on the inside.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That there's a little more easy to put together."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Or maybe on the outside so she doesn't realize it's not made of lead?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't need to be as-- Am I here? I've been doing this with my spells.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's up to you. Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It needs to be sealed all the way around and be able to close.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's a good friend of my mom's.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Right."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Everybody knows her mom.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Okay, we’ll go ahead and get started on that there. Full cost to you, two days' work, materials. That'll run you back about one and a half gold. One gold, five silver."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think that is acceptable, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Here. Will you also engrave it with, "Love you so much"?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It'll be an additional silver."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

payload.trigger_phrase: You make your way to the warm
payload.raw_text: Okay. It’s still early morning, relatively. You make your way to the warm, welcoming interior of the Invulnerable Vagrant. There are no other patrons in there. You do see, across the way, one Pumat Sol is sitting behind the counter with knitting needles. There is one off to the side in a chair that’s currently reading through a book, the small set of glasses on the tip of his wide nose. They both look up and go, "Why, hello there! That's just a real nice thing to see you this early in the morning. Just about to finish my breakfast snack, so you caught me at a good time."

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Anyway, I don't want to bring out all of this stuff from the assassin guy in front of him!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: Let's go shopping at Pumat Sol’s and then we’ll divvy up everything when we’re in private.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: You guys making your way to the Pentamarket?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. It’s still early morning, relatively. You make your way to the warm, welcoming interior of the Invulnerable Vagrant. There are no other patrons in there. You do see, across the way, one Pumat Sol is sitting behind the counter with knitting needles. There is one off to the side in a chair that’s currently reading through a book, the small set of glasses on the tip of his wide nose. They both look up and go, "Why, hello there! That's just a real nice thing to see you this early in the morning. Just about to finish my breakfast snack, so you caught me at a good time."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I had a dream about Pumat Sol attacking us.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You did not!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Attacking us?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I did. I had a dream about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What?! That seems terrible!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is Laura actually. I did have a dream.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What, are you serious? That’s terrifying!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I was starting to go in that direction of: Is this a real thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, it really was. It was a dream that Pumat Sol betrayed us and he attacked us all. Anyway--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is Clarota aftershock.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I’m just letting you know. We don't know anything about him.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I think if you give him a chance, he'll do you right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (banjo music)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Anyway, I don't want to bring out all of this stuff from the assassin guy in front of him!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's go shopping at Pumat Sol’s and then we’ll divvy up everything when we’re in private.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys making your way to the Pentamarket?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (Pumat voice) Respectfully, we are.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Not all the time. We generally do a cycle of sunrise to about four hours past sunset. That's our general scheme that we maintain business."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys making your way to the Pentamarket?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (Pumat voice) Respectfully, we are.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. It’s still early morning, relatively. You make your way to the warm, welcoming interior of the Invulnerable Vagrant. There are no other patrons in there. You do see, across the way, one Pumat Sol is sitting behind the counter with knitting needles. There is one off to the side in a chair that’s currently reading through a book, the small set of glasses on the tip of his wide nose. They both look up and go, "Why, hello there! That's just a real nice thing to see you this early in the morning. Just about to finish my breakfast snack, so you caught me at a good time."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The fuck?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are you open all the time?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is normal, it’s okay!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "We got this nice shield over here that we just had finished a couple days ago. That's an enchanted little delightful piece. That one is a little more affordable at about 550 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think we’re probably going to need a couple of healing potions as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, to replenish.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Not a problem."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I’m going to window shop, then! Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Pumat, we came into a little extra coin recently and this is our favorite place to spend. You don’t happen to have any articles of protection, do you? A necklace, a bracelet, a ring?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, we got this here cloak here on the wall. I think you’ve already taken a look at it. That’s a pretty protective--"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It was expensive, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It was expensive.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The other one who's knitting is like, "Yeah, it’s a pretty penny because that’s a pretty item." Goes back to knitting.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, how much precisely was that one again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That one will run you about 800 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Still out of the reach there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (singing) How much is that doggy in the window?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "About a week's worth of enchanting time, the cost will put you at about 250 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That is none of your concern."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How much to make it my concern?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Your friend is a strange one."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She really is. She's always asking questions that are weird.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: She is very useful in the right circumstances.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, I can entirely understand that."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm right here! I can hear you all talking about me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She can catch arrows out of midair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's really impressive."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Mr. Pumat, I have another request. I know that I had requested, would it be possible to invent a small haversack? Just the pocket thing. But do you have any sort of magic incantation ability-- if I gave you a flask, could you make it never run out of alcohol?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Actually, that is a very doable enchantment. It'll take us a little while, but we can definitely make something like that happen."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How much would that R&D cost me?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Right, so another 50 off you. 12, nothing at the moment. It's only been a few days, and the enchantment process and/or the coming in of new objects can take a while to stock back up. The shield is the most recent creation that was presented. That's the only new one you see. Other than that, there's still the pearl, there's still the cloak. A few other odds and small wands.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should probably get back and put the thing in this box, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The box is presented, you pay for that, 15 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's black. It's not green, blue, or purple. It's black text. It took me a second to realize.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe you should cancel the order. Have him make something else.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What should we have him make?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: A flask.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A lead flask. It's weird, every level the intelligence gets lower.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, should we go?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hold your horses.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, we're looking up something.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: While this is happening, Pumat picks up the book again and puts the glasses on, and starts continuing to read.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I was doing a look around to see if there was anything new.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Did we get any healing potions?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I got one.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you need any more, Caleb?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I am very good, thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll buy a healing potion.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "That one will run you 75 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's cool, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That guy's crazy!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He's actually still here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Gah!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's get back to business. I don't know what you have on tap here, but I'm looking for something, just a cantrip, pretty common, shocking--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Shocking Grasp. I know what you're talking about."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You know how it works?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I got it myself. Anyone want to see?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I would like it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All righty. I like the gumption." He goes and gives a big old handshake to Beauregard. Let me look that up real fast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what I'm agreeing to.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's an auto-hit, because you're reaching out to it. You immediately grab his giant mitt, and a flash of white light and pain as electricity rocks through your body. You take three points of lightning damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (yelps) Fuck!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That is the one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Get that!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "275 gold pieces." He sets his book back down, puts his glasses down, leaves the room for a second, and is gone for about a minute or so. Comes back with two scrolls and sets them on the table.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (yelps) Fuck!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That is the one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Get that!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That one will run you 75 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Excellent. Pause. The other thing--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Hands. They look paws-ish, but yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The other one that I am interested in that is not really my forte, but many wizards believe it is of great benefit. Do you have the Shield spell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We can get you a Shield spell. That's a pretty standard defensive mechanism for those of the arcane persuasion."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How much will that run me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He thumbs through the ledger. "That one will cost you about 200 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will take the pair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All righty there."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What was the first one?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shocking Grasp.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll be twinsies.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "275 gold pieces." He sets his book back down, puts his glasses down, leaves the room for a second, and is gone for about a minute or so. Comes back with two scrolls and sets them on the table.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (yelps) Fuck!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That is the one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Get that!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That one will run you 75 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Excellent. Pause. The other thing--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Hands. They look paws-ish, but yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The other one that I am interested in that is not really my forte, but many wizards believe it is of great benefit. Do you have the Shield spell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We can get you a Shield spell. That's a pretty standard defensive mechanism for those of the arcane persuasion."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How much will that run me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He thumbs through the ledger. "That one will cost you about 200 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will take the pair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All righty there."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What was the first one?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shocking Grasp.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll be twinsies.

payload.raw_text: Yep, for the next minute, your face is curled up into a Joker-like smile.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: What kind of a saving throw?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Is it a wisdom saving throw?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Oh, that's not good for me. Nope, definitely not.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you all slowly descend down the stairs, it closes behind you. You hear a few things shift over it. You descend down the stairway, and you begin to pick up the sound of soft music. There's a gentle violin playing, and a lute or some sort of small string instrument. This staircase spirals downward onto the left, and as it curves down for about 40 or so feet, it's getting colder just from the subterranean depth, that you're going from the warmer surface. Eventually, you hear some voices and some laughter, and a clink of glasses. As you curve down, the light gets brighter from around the corner, until suddenly you look into a stone-set subterranean tavern. From floor to ceiling, it's about 20 feet tall. You can see there are two balconies that overlook it from the left side, and one that's barely visible around the corner, as the room opens up to the right of you. There's a table immediately down from where the spiral staircase ends, and there's a gruff-looking fellow sitting there looking up as you enter. He looks immediately defensive. The rest of the people in there are drinking, and not immediately paying attention. As you begin to descend the stairway, who all’s going in?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hi.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 'Sup.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Can I get you anything?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, I know I'd like a drink.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I would like some milk.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But unfortunately we have no coin. However, we are willing to offer many gifts.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Right. Well, then. Take these gifts with you." He turns around and looks at the rest of you, and steps into the back room.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do we follow him?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm so scared right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Do you follow him?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we fucking follow him into the room!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You step into the back room of this dive, and as you step inside, it's a storage cupboard. There's shelves up there with various bottles of liquor, wine, and ale. He's currently pulling a small chain up on the corner. As he does, you watch as a small trap door goes (creaking), it winches up, and there's a stairway that leads down. And he goes--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Mazel tov.
